content.json:
# Token Usage — Content Generation Solution Accelerator
---

This workbook visualizes LLM token consumption emitted by the orchestrator as Application Insights custom events:

- **`LLM_Token_Usage_Summary`** — one event per user turn / brief parse / regeneration. Carries `total_input_tokens`, `total_output_tokens`, `total_tokens`, `source`, `conversation_id`, `user_id`.
- **`LLM_Agent_Token_Usage`** — one event per agent per turn. Carries `agent_name`, `model_deployment_name`, `input_tokens`, `output_tokens`, `total_tokens`.
- **`LLM_Model_Token_Usage`** — one event per model deployment per turn. Carries `model_deployment_name`, `input_tokens`, `output_tokens`, `total_tokens`.

Use the time-range selector at the top to widen or narrow the window.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Token_Usage_Summary'
| extend input_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_input_tokens'])
| extend output_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_output_tokens'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize
    TotalRequests = count(),
    TotalInputTokens = sum(input_tokens),
    TotalOutputTokens = sum(output_tokens),
    TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens),
    AvgTokensPerRequest = round(avg(total_tokens), 0)
content.title: Total token usage

content.query:
let _range = totimespan('{TimeRange:duration}');
let _bin = iff(_range > 1d, 1d, 1h);
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Token_Usage_Summary'
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| extend input_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_input_tokens'])
| extend output_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_output_tokens'])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens), InputTokens = sum(input_tokens), OutputTokens = sum(output_tokens) by bin(timestamp, _bin)
| render timechart
content.title: Token usage over time

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Agent_Token_Usage'
| extend agent = tostring(customDimensions['agent_name'])
| extend input_tokens = toint(customDimensions['input_tokens'])
| extend output_tokens = toint(customDimensions['output_tokens'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize
    InputTokens = sum(input_tokens),
    OutputTokens = sum(output_tokens),
    TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens),
    Invocations = count()
    by Agent = agent
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Token usage by agent

content.query:
let StageMapping = datatable(agent:string, Stage:string) [
    'rai_agent', 'Safety & RAI',
    'planning_agent', 'Brief Parsing',
    'text_content_agent', 'Text Generation',
    'image_content_agent', 'Image Generation',
    'compliance_agent', 'Compliance'
];
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Agent_Token_Usage'
| extend agent = tostring(customDimensions['agent_name'])
| extend input_tokens = toint(customDimensions['input_tokens'])
| extend output_tokens = toint(customDimensions['output_tokens'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| lookup kind=leftouter StageMapping on agent
| extend Stage = iff(isempty(Stage), 'Other', Stage)
| summarize
    Invocations = count(),
    InputTokens = sum(input_tokens),
    OutputTokens = sum(output_tokens),
    TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens),
    AvgTokensPerInvocation = round(avg(total_tokens), 0)
    by Stage
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Token usage by pipeline stage

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Model_Token_Usage'
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions['model_deployment_name'])
| extend input_tokens = toint(customDimensions['input_tokens'])
| extend output_tokens = toint(customDimensions['output_tokens'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize
    InputTokens = sum(input_tokens),
    OutputTokens = sum(output_tokens),
    TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens),
    Invocations = count()
    by Model = model
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Token usage by model deployment

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Token_Usage_Summary'
| extend source = tostring(customDimensions['source'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize
    Requests = count(),
    TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens),
    AvgTokensPerRequest = round(avg(total_tokens), 0)
    by Source = source
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Token usage by source (entry point)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Token_Usage_Summary'
| extend user_id = tostring(customDimensions['user_id'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| extend User = iff(isempty(user_id) or user_id == 'anonymous', 'anonymous', user_id)
| summarize Requests = count(), TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens) by User
| order by TotalTokens desc
| take 25
content.title: Top users by token consumption

content.query:
let _range = totimespan('{TimeRange:duration}');
let _bin = iff(_range > 1d, 1d, 1h);
customEvents
| where name == 'LLM_Agent_Token_Usage'
| extend agent = tostring(customDimensions['agent_name'])
| extend total_tokens = toint(customDimensions['total_tokens'])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(total_tokens) by bin(timestamp, _bin), agent
| render timechart
content.title: Per-agent token usage over time
